result.noWebMatch: No matching information found on the web

camera.httpsRequired: Camera requires HTTPS. Please access via HTTPS.
camera.notAllowed: Camera access denied. Please allow camera access in browser settings.
camera.notFound: No camera found. Please check your camera connection.
camera.notReadable: Camera is in use by another application.

settings.dryRunActiveTitle: Test mode active (no API key usage)
settings.dryRunInactiveTitle: Switch to test mode (no API key usage)

dupSkip.pausedTitle: Same content detected {count} times — Move camera to resume
dupSkip.countingTitle: Same content detected {count} times ({max} to skip)

help.title: Mode Guide
help.textDesc: Reads text from the camera (OCR). Ideal for extracting text from documents, signs, and business cards.
help.objectDesc: Detects objects in the image and displays their names and positions. Automatically recognizes bottles, boxes, equipment, etc.
help.labelDesc: Checks for label presence. Shows OK if text is readable, NG otherwise. Inspection interval is 5 seconds.
help.faceDesc: Detects faces and analyzes emotions (joy, sorrow, anger, surprise). Can detect multiple faces simultaneously.
help.logoDesc: Detects brand logos in images and displays names with confidence scores. Useful for product package verification.
help.classifyDesc: AI classifies the entire image and adds tags. Get an overview of what's in the image.
help.webDesc: Searches the web for similar images and displays estimated names, related pages, and similar image links.
help.oneShotDesc: Takes one shot, shows the result, and stops.
help.continuousDesc: Continues scanning automatically after analysis, detecting the next stable frame.
help.dupSkipDesc: Pauses scanning after detecting the same content a specified number of times until the camera moves.
